_readme: Resolves each workbook Destination (DST###) and Article (ART###) to a real route in app/. Hand-maintained from the repo; merged into generated/destinations.json and generated/articles.json as resolvedUrl by scripts/build-chumdata.mjs. A real URL typed into the workbook wins over this overlay. 'embedded: true' marks destinations that have no route by design (in-chat games, the popup action). Entries with resolvedUrl null and no embedded flag are genuine gaps for Steve, listed in agent/NEEDS_STEVE.md.

DST001.note: Not a route. Opens the pre-order / discount OfferModal via window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pc:open-offer')). See app/pick-a-chum/data/discount-popup.ts.

DST002.note: ChumDrop = the root PackPit physics game (next.config.ts redirects /pack-pit -> /). Footer and BentoBoard label '/' as 'Chum Drop'.

DST003.note: In-chat mini-game (Nine-Square Sheep Management). Built after Checkpoint 2.

DST004.note: In-chat mini-game (Missing Sheep). Built after Checkpoint 2.

DST005.note: In-chat mini-game (Kennel Sketch Recognition). Built after Checkpoint 2.

DST006.note: Know Your Chum(s) index. Individual dog pages live at /chums/<slug>.

DST009.note: Chum Finder = the Chum Calculator suitability test (bento tile 'Chum Finder' -> /chum-calculator).

DST010.note: Family pointer, not a single URL. Resolved per article via generated/articles.json resolvedUrl.

DST011.note: Answered in-chat, not by a page (Steve: no rules route exists or is planned). The dogs answer directly from app/pick-a-chum/data/rules.ts.

DST013.note: Contact = email link (confirmed by Steve). No /contact route; the site uses hello@Pedigree-Chums.co.uk.

ART001.note: Confirmed by Steve: 'Dog Intelligence Essay' points at 'Your Dog Is Smarter Than the Test'.

ART002.note: PLANNED: 'The Secret Language of the Head Tilt' not yet built (workbook status Planned).

ART003.note: PLANNED/GAP: no heat-safety article found. /hot-dogs is the game mode 'Hot Dogs', not heat safety.

ART004.note: Confirmed by Steve: 'Dogs at Work: Detection and Scent' points at the teaching-medicine article.

ART005.note: Confirmed by Steve: no herding article exists; points at the Dogs at Work index for now.

ART006.note: Good Dog / Bad Dog essay index (7 articles live).

ART009.note: PLANNED: 'Learning Through Play' not yet built.

ART010.note: Interim mapping (Steve): 'The Power of Smell' is not built; points at the teaching-medicine article for now.
